subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the clear tokens on a Day wherein by His light the earth and heaven were illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات فی یوم بنوره اشرقت الارض و السماء
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
